title: Cronos Group (CRON) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Cronos Group Q1 2024 earnings call transcript. Net revenue reached $25.3 million, representing 30% year-over-year increase. The company achieved record net revenue from continuing operations on record basis. Gross profit of $4.5 million, up 53% year-over-year. Gross margin improved significantly. Adjusted EBITDA improved to loss of $10.7 million from $15.7 million loss year-over-year. Net loss improved to $2.5 million from $18.0 million in Q1 2023. Canadian market grew 31% year-over-year while Israel grew 27% year-over-year. Management emphasized targeting specific consumer needs rather than competing on price. Strategic focus includes international expansion with UK market entry. Strong cash position of $855 million provides flexibility for growth investments. Guidance for positive net cash flow in 2024 and cost savings of $5-10 million.
